title: scene
prompt: close up, delicate face, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, intricate details, 8k resolution, masterpiece, raw photo, same Vietnamese woman, long black hair, pale elegant dress, fierce calm gaze, luxury hotel corridor, wealthy family conflict, hidden evidence, elegant shadows, tense silence
